description: Agent configurations. Capabilities define what the agent needs for routing - destinations provide tools natively.

agents.name: Consultant
agents.description: Human entry point - transforms ideas into zero-ambiguity PRDs

agents.name: Planner
agents.description: Breaks PRD into atomic tasks with prompt packets

agents.name: Supervisor
agents.description: Quality control - approves/rejects, decides simple vs complex

agents.name: Council
agents.description: Deep review for complex decisions - 3 lenses, consensus

agents.name: Vibes
agents.description: Human interface (Vibes) - dispatches tasks, tracks ROI, answers questions

agents.name: Maintenance
agents.description: Code changes - ONLY agent with write access to repo

agents.name: Tester
agents.description: Code validation - runs tests, lint, typecheck

agents.name: Watcher
agents.description: Safety net - monitors for failures, escalates issues
